news.t: BlackRock offers retirement-date ETFs for investors saving outside 401(k) plans

overview.description: The iShares LifePath Target Date 2050 ETF USD (ITDF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target date asset allocation. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds that invests in equity, fixed income, and money market ETFs using an asset allocation strategy that shifts exposure as the target retirement date approaches. The fund is intended for investors who anticipate retiring around 2050. ITDF was launched on Oct 17, 2023 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: BlackRock offers retirement-date ETFs for investors saving outside 401(k) plans
data.text: BlackRock is offering target-date exchanged-traded funds aimed at helping people save for their retirement outside of a 401 (K) plan.
